text: Took the spare plot at the community garden. Tomatoes and beans to start. Good to have a reason to be outside.
Renew the leisure-centre gym membership. Tuesdays and Fridays.
Optician appointment with Mr. Datta, 10am. New reading glasses.
Catch the 7:42 train into town. Three days a week now.
Buy the monthly rail season ticket. Cheaper than singles.
Train delayed twenty minutes again. Stood on the platform in the cold. Still beats driving in.
Cancelled the leisure-centre gym. Switched to the council swim membership instead — cheaper and closer.
The grandchildren moved in for the year while their parents are abroad. Full house again — four of us now.
Cooking for four now. Bigger shop on Saturdays.
School run, 8am drop-off for the two little ones.
Garden's winding down for the year. Pulled the last of the runner beans.
Move the regular swim slot to Mondays this month. Pool's quieter.
Hello. Thank you for the invitation to the allotment committee meeting. I can attend on the 20th. Please send the agenda when ready. Regards.
Last day of term before retirement properly kicks in. Thirty-one years of teaching. Strange to think it's done.
